creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200149
py-napalm-logs-0.7.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net-mgmt/py-napalm-logs to 0.7.0 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://napalm-logs.com/en/latest/releases/0.7.0.html

Changes to the port:
- removed BUILD_DEPENDS because devel/py-pip is no longer required for building the package
- pacify portlint

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-RELEASE, 13.0-CURRENT@r341836 amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
